bio:
I bridge the gap between your technical development teams and structured project execution. As a Scrum Master and Agile Specialist with a background in Computer Science, I help tech startups and development teams streamline workflows, maintain tight project timelines, and clear delivery roadblocks.
How I can help your team:
Jira Management: Setting up boards, managing backlogs, and tracking sprint metrics.
Sprint Facilitation: Running efficient daily standups, sprint planning, and retrospectives.
Technical Alignment: Translating complex business requirements into clear developer tasks (tickets).
Let’s chat about how we can get your development pipeline running like clockwork!
